'''topapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackable|jackable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackable|jackable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| topapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || topapithi || topapiji || topapishi || topapiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || topaputhu || topapuju || topapushu || topapuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || topaputhu || topapuju || topapushu || topapuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || topapufthuf || topapufjuf || topapufshuf || topapufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || topapethe || topapeje || topapeshe || topapeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || topapotho || topapojo || topaposho || topapoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || topapotho || topapojo || topaposho || topapoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || topapofthof || topapofjof || topapofshof || topapofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || topapïfthïf || topapïfjïf || topapïfshïf || topapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || topapïfthïf || topapïfjïf || topapïfshïf || topapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || topapïfthïf || topapïfjïf || topapïfshïf || topapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || topapïfthïf || topapïfjïf || topapïfshïf || topapïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || topapæthæ || topapæjæ || topapæshæ || topapækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || topapatha || topapaja || topapasha || topapaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || topapatha || topapaja || topapasha || topapaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || topapafthaf || topapafjaf || topapafshaf || topapafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || topapasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || topapshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || topaproasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || topapmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || topapyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotopapnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotopapnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotopapnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotopapnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || topapapasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || topapapshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || topapaproasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || topapapmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || topapapyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotopapapnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotopapapnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotopapapnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotopapapnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || tepæpasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || tepæpshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || tepæproasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || tepæpmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || tepæpyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotepæpnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotepæpnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotepæpnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotepæpnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || topfapasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || topfapshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || topfaproasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || topfapmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || topfapyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotopfapnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotopfapnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotopfapnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotopfapnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
